name: Recommendation
goal: Display a prioritised recommendation or advice block with a colored left-border accent, title, impact line, and optional actions footer.
description: Card-like block that encodes a single actionable recommendation. A four-value priority enum (p0–p3) drives the left-border color and the visible priority badge. Title and impact accept both plain string attributes and rich slot overrides (CDR-002). Body accepts arbitrary children. An optional actions slot holds call-to-action buttons or links.

props.name: priority
props.description: Priority tier. Drives left-border color and badge: p0=red (critical), p1=amber (high), p2=blue (medium, default), p3=neutral (low).

props.name: title
props.description: Short headline text. Use slot='title' for rich markup (code, chips, links).

props.name: impact
props.description: Short impact line (e.g. '−40% latency'). Use slot='impact' for rich markup.

slots.description: Body / description text. Accepts arbitrary children: plain text, <a>, <code>, <ce-chip>, etc.

slots.name: title
slots.description: Rich title override; used when the title needs <code>, <ce-chip>, or other inline elements. Supersedes the title attribute.

slots.name: impact
slots.description: Rich impact override; used when the impact line needs inline chips, links, or emphasis. Supersedes the impact attribute.

slots.name: meta
slots.description: Optional metadata line shown below the title row (e.g. 'owner: backend', 'due: Q3').

slots.name: actions
slots.description: Optional footer row of action buttons or links, separated by a top border. Accepts arbitrary children (CDR-006).

cssVariables.name: --ce-border-strong
cssVariables.description: p3 left-border color and p3 badge border.

cssVariables.name: --ce-space-2
cssVariables.description: Header gap, badge horizontal padding, actions gap, impact/meta bottom margin.

cssVariables.name: --ce-space-3
cssVariables.description: Outer vertical padding and actions top margin.

cssVariables.name: --ce-text
cssVariables.description: Body text and title text color.

cssVariables.name: --ce-text-sm
cssVariables.description: Impact line, meta line, and body font size.

cssVariables.name: --ce-color-red
cssVariables.description: p0 left-border color and badge text.

cssVariables.name: --ce-color-amber
cssVariables.description: p1 left-border color and badge text.

cssVariables.name: --ce-color-blue
cssVariables.description: p2 left-border color and badge text (default).

cssVariables.name: --ce-color-green
cssVariables.description: Impact line text color (positive impact signal).

a11y.notes: The inner <article> element provides implicit landmark semantics. The priority badge carries aria-label='Priority: P{n}' so screen readers announce the tier without relying on color alone.
